prompt: I just installed PKA. How do I use this?
expect: detects bootstrapped state; offers full tour or module-specific jump; does not start executing — teaches by describing prompts user can try

prompt: Give me a tour of PKA.
expect: runs through 7 modules with user's actual Repo Map folder names substituted; each module ends with concrete 'try this' prompts; checks in between modules

prompt: How do I capture meeting notes?
expect: jumps to Module 4 (meeting capture); explains three modes; checks if thinkkit is installed and adapts guidance; hands off to pka-meetings for actual capture

prompt: How do I find things in my knowledge base?
expect: Module 2 only; explains 4 query types; uses user's actual folder names in examples; ends with try-this prompts
menu of capabilities with short descriptions; asks which to dive into; does not launch full tour unprompted

prompt: Walk me through PKA — I'm new.
expect: pre-flight check of state first; if not bootstrapped, hands off to pka-bootstrap; if bootstrapped, offers full tour

prompt: How do I drop files into the system?
expect: Module 3 (inbox pattern); explains team-inbox/owner-inbox distinction, transcript special-casing, batch processing
